case_title: MOHAMMAD RAFIQ HANIF VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MOHAMMAD RAFIQ HANIF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, REPRESENTED BY MARLEENA GREEN IS PRESENT. JAMES DOYLE, SFMTA REPRESENTATIVE TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
